calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-093 z_beta heartbeat rate modulation: step-level Pearson r (fixes EXQ-097 episode-averaging flaw)
items.description: Discriminative pair BETA_MOD_ON vs BETA_MOD_OFF. C1 redesigned: step-level Pearson r(|z_beta|_norm, 1/e3_steps_per_tick) >= 0.15. 500 warmup episodes. EXQ-097 used episode-level mean gap which was too coarse (16:1 pool skew, minimal between-episode z_beta variance).
items.hypothesis: Step-level |z_beta| magnitude positively correlates with instantaneous E3 tick rate (r>=0.15) when BETA_MOD_ON vs OFF.
